framework.name: Private Preview Status of Merchant ID Controls
framework.description: Merchant-specific blocking (individual merchant ID restrictions) is still in private preview as of documentation date, requiring Stripe partnership for access. Indicates this granular control isn't production-ready for autonomous agent use cases.
framework.raw_quote: Merchant ID spending controls is in private preview. You must be an Issuing user to participate. To learn more or request access, contact Stripe.
